description_long: This object is a round loaf of bread with a dark brown, textured crust and a soft, pale interior. The loaf has been partially sliced, revealing three thick, even slices separated from the main body. The crust is slightly glossy and features a single, shallow score across the top, with a rough, pebbled surface. The interior is dense and uniform, with a few small air pockets visible in the slices. The bread appears artisanal, resembling a rustic rye or country loaf, and is suitable for serving in urban environments such as cafes, bakeries, or street food stalls. No branding or packaging is visible, and the bread is presented as a standalone food item.
description: A round, dark brown loaf of bread with a rough crust and three thick, pale slices cut from it. The bread has a rustic, artisanal appearance with a scored top and dense interior.
description_view_0: The loaf is shown from the side, clearly displaying the unsliced portion and three separated slices with visible crust and interior.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the top and side of the loaf, showing the alignment of the slices and the scored, textured crust.
description_view_2: A side view with the slices separated, emphasizing the thickness of each slice and the rough, brown crust.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the unsliced dome of the loaf, showing the scored, pebbled crust with minimal visibility of the sliced interior.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is dark brown with a rough, pebbled texture and a single shallow score running across the top. There is no visible flour dusting or seeds, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance.
